description:
A DeepSeek-native coding agent, for your terminal.

Reasonix talks straight to api.deepseek.com. The loop is append-only, engineered around DeepSeek's byte-stable prefix cache — long sessions hold 90%+ cache hit and input-token cost collapses to ~1/5. Terminal-first, leave it running.
What's Changed
- fix(crash-report): stabilize community review table and add one-click copy by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5959
- Fix deferred settings rebuild after persistence / 修复持久化后热刷新延迟失败 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5952
- fix(registry): reject whole-repo source when publishing a skill by @esengine in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5962
- Fix cascading session recovery / 修复会话恢复级联 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5977
- Explain unavailable bash sandbox recovery / 说明 bash 沙箱不可用时的恢复方式 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5983
- Fix desktop session lease race and remaining runtime data races / 修复桌面端会话租约竞态及其余运行时数据竞态 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5968
- Surface effort switch blockers / 显示推理力度切换阻塞原因 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5971
- Fix session recovery persistence cleanup / 修复会话恢复持久化清理 by @SivanCola in https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/pull/5976
Full Changelog: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix/compare/desktop-v1.16.2...desktop-v1.17.0
